prompt: Create a cinematic fantasy MMO raid boss loading-screen-style illustration with a full custom game UI overlay. The scene is set at dusk in front of the glass cube Apple Store, with the glowing white Apple logo centered on the building facade. In the middle of the plaza stands a giant raid boss version of Tim Cook, labeled as "The Architect," wearing a fitted black turtleneck, dark pants, and sneakers, holding a glowing smartphone in one hand and posing calmly with the other hand open. His face is intentionally blurred or anonymized. The overall tone is epic, satirical, and high-production, like a World of Warcraft raid encounter screen mixed with corporate tech parody. Around him, exactly 20 fantasy raiders in a semicircle battle formation face inward toward the boss, with varied races and silhouettes including armored warriors, rogues, mages, shamans, hunters, and orc-like and human-like characters. Several are casting bright spells in orange fire, blue lightning, green energy, and purple void magic. Include exactly 3 small robotic adds near the boss, each labeled "Supplier Add," with squat industrial bodies and Apple logos on their fronts. Also include 2 active encounter mechanic bubbles: one blue spherical shield labeled "Margin Shield" on the right side of the boss, and one purple circular dome labeled "Closed System" farther right with a humanoid enemy trapped inside. Build the image as a complete raid UI composition. Top left: a large expansion-style title reading "SIEGE OF THE INFINITE LOOP" with subtitle "20-MAN HORDE RAID." Far left: a vertical "RAID FRAMES" panel listing exactly 20 player names in numbered rows from 1 to 20 with colored health bars. Top center: a boss portrait frame with the boss name Tim Cook, subtitle "The Architect," and a red health bar at 100%. Top right: a large encounter guide panel titled "ENCOUNTER: TIM COOK – \"THE ARCHITECT\"" containing exactly 3 phases. Phase 1 title: "SUPPLY CHAIN DOMINANCE (100% – 70%)" with 3 abilities: "Logistics Surge – Summons waves of Supplier Adds.", "Margin Shield – Reduces incoming damage by 40% for 10 sec.", and "Quarterly Pressure – Stacking debuff, explodes if not dispelled." Phase 2 title: "ECOSYSTEM LOCK-IN (70% – 30%)" with 3 abilities: "Closed System – Isolates 3 players, puzzle to return.", "Subscription Drain – Raid-wide damage over time.", and "Device Sync – Stack in correct formations to avoid spikes." Phase 3 title: "ONE MORE THING (30% – 0%)" with 3 abilities: "Surprise Launch – Massive AoE burst every 20 sec.", "Reality Distortion Field – Reverses controls briefly.", and "Enrage: Market Collapse – Boss enrages at 3:00." Bottom right: a "POTENTIAL LOOT" panel listing exactly 4 items with rarity-colored text: "Executive Cloak of Efficiency (Epic)", "Keynote Blade (Epic)", "Ecosystem Ring (Epic)", and "Investor's Favor (Bonus – Hard Mode)." Below that, add a small red-black badge reading "HARD MODE" and the line "Activate \"Investor Call\" during the fight to" with the remaining text cut off or obscured. Bottom left: a "CHAT" box with 4 lines, including taunting boss dialogue and a player response, such as "Tim Cook yells: Innovation. Discipline. Excellence. That is how we win.", "Tim Cook yells: Our ecosystem is unbreakable.", "Tim Cook yells: One more thing...", and "Lok'tarbrok: Lok'tar ogar!" Along the bottom center: a fantasy action bar with exactly 12 ability icons in ornate slots, some numbered, some showing cooldown text including "2m" and "1m". Use dramatic volumetric lighting, glossy reflections on the wet plaza, realistic environment rendering, highly detailed fantasy characters, exaggerated spell effects, dark vignette, sharp UI typography, and polished AAA game key art composition.
